 {"id":"bd-ecmd","title":"Add type: event for state transitions","description":"Events capture operational state changes as immutable records.

Fields needed:
- event_type: string (namespaced category like patrol.muted, agent.started)  
- actor: string (entity URI who caused this)
- target: string (entity URI or bead ID affected)
- payload: object (event-specific JSON data)

Example:
  id: evt-x7k2
  type: event
  event_type: patrol.muted
  actor: human:overseer
  target: agent:deacon
  payload: {reason: fixing deadlock, until: gt-abc1}

This enables:
- bd activity --follow showing events
- bd list --type=event --target=agent:deacon
- Full audit trail for operational state
- HOP-compatible transaction records","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-30T15:15:23.440095-08:00","created_by":"gastown/crew/max","updated_at":"2025-12-30T18:12:30.97233-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T16:13:57.467275-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented type: event for state transitions with all required fields"}
 {"id":"bd-ee1","title":"Add security tests for WriteFile permissions in doctor command","description":"Test coverage gap identified by automated analysis (vc-217).

**Original Issue:** [deleted:[deleted:bd-da96-baseline-lint]]

In cmd/bd/doctor/gitignore.go:98, os.WriteFile uses 0644 permissions, flagged by gosec G306 as potentially too permissive.

Add tests to verify:
- File is created with appropriate permissions (0600 or less)
- Existing file permissions are not loosened
- File ownership is correct
- Sensitive data handling if .gitignore contains secrets

This ensures .gitignore files are created with secure permissions to prevent unauthorized access.

_This issue was automatically created by AI test coverage analysis._","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-21T10:25:33.529153-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-22T14:57:44.539058246-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ee1","depends_on_id":"bd-da96-baseline-lint","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-11-21T10:25:33.530705-05:00","created_by":"ai-supervisor"}]}
